description: Synthesia video, two-hand, green right / blue left, 6/8 time

left_hand.comment: Left hand enters first, single notes

right_hand.comment: Right hand enters ~3s after left, eighth notes at 180/min

checks: Left hand starts before right hand
Right hand first note is E (octave TBD)
Right hand plays eighth notes (interval ~0.33s between onsets)
No black key bleed (adjacent black+white same hand same time = bleed)
